title: Colonial Archive Explorer
public_claim: Colonial Archive Explorer is presented as a regional and security-studies page.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from source intake and domain framing to case structure, institutional interpretation, evidence limits, and public analytical synthesis. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
use_value: It shows the utility of Colonial Archive Explorer by tying the project purpose to the mechanism that makes it inspectable, reusable, or professionally valuable.

minimum_public_demo: Test one representative case; confirm input (packet name, source files, version signal, scope...) produces output (what the packet is and what decision it can still...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
